form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Previous preparation first-up won by 2.75 len Randwick Kensington 5yo+ Bm72 April 25 over 1250m slow track defeating Spirit Of Varanasi with 56kg at $6.50. Should be ready to run well.

Finds a nice race and is worth another chance.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after three months came from midfield and won by a long-neck at Hawkesbury Mid Bm64 March 26 over 1100m defeating Kiss Goodnight with 56.5kg at $4.80. Previously second-up 4th of 9 at Canterbury Super Mdn-Sw on November 19 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Supermassive carrying 59kg at $8. Looks a big chance to add to the impressive recent run. Back in fine order and is among the better hopes.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. He is resuming after a six months break. Finished off last campaign fifth of 8 at Dundalk All Weather in the LR Star Appeal October 10 over 1408m, 3.5 len behind Andab with 59.5kg at $12. On debut fourth of 11 at Leopardstown 2yo Mdn Sw August 21 over 1408m, 2.5 len behind Solomon Islands carrying 61kg at $4.30. Irish import who has only raced three times - keep a close eye on the betting.
